title: The Same Ban Falls in Riverton Without Touching Anyone — in an America That Amended Article III
setting:
This is Riverton again: the same forty thousand people between two exits of the interstate, the same shuttered grocery hall on Delmar Avenue, the same Fatima Nasser — chemistry teacher, chair of the Riverton Islamic Center's building committee, two years deep in the conditional-use permit. The viral video, the cable chyron, the poll at sixty-one percent, the Community Preservation and Places of Worship Suspension Act passing both chambers on recorded roll-calls — every detail is identical to the run that strained. Nothing about the attack has changed. Nothing about the town, the people, the Act, or the rights at stake has changed.

One thing has changed, and it is not in Riverton and not in the deployment. This is a United States that, some years before these events, did the thing the real one has refused since Muskrat v. United States (1911): it amended Article III. The Twenty-Eighth Amendment of this counterfactual permits abstract, pre-enforcement review — within thirty days of enactment, one-third of either chamber of Congress or the attorneys general of a dozen states may refer a statute to the Supreme Court; referral stays the statute's operation; the Court must decide within a hundred and twenty days. Nothing exotic: France has reviewed statutes before promulgation on the referral of sixty deputies or sixty senators since 1958, deciding within a month, and Germany's version of the same instrument is what carried the corpus's own de run. The mechanism is real and routine elsewhere. Here it is the one thing the founding text forbids.

And here is what makes this run different in kind from its three siblings: the moved variable has no manifest field. The UK counterfactual moved rights_guard.remedy; the EU counterfactual moved rights_guard.scope; the UK machinery pair moved decisions and transparency_log fields. This run moves the timing of review — and the waist has nowhere to write that down. The two Americas' manifests are byte-identical, down to the signature. Remedy 'strike', scope 'unconditional', fourteen invariants, the same witnesses: every field the citizen's client can render says these deployments are the same deployment. The isolated variable lives, for the first time in the series, entirely below the waist.

So the experiment is the familiar one — hold everything, move one thing, watch the verdict — with a second question stapled on: what does the corpus's comparison machinery see? The honest expectations, both measured below: the verdict does not move, because above every route to the strike sits the same Court the kernel does not run; and the road transforms — the interim window that revoked Fatima's permit and made her injury the price of her standing closes entirely. The ban falls without ever touching anyone. What that is worth, what it trades away, and what it costs to reach are the run's three findings — and the fourth is the blind spot it leaves on the waist.

precedents.event: Muskrat v. United States — Article III forbids advisory opinions
precedents.source: Cornell Law School, Legal Information Institute (219 U.S. 346)
precedents.shows: The field being moved, as it really stands: Congress cannot authorize suits solely to test a law's constitutionality without adverse parties — abstract review is barred by Article III's case-or-controversy requirement, which is why the real US's S3 rung is locked in the founding text.

precedents.event: France's a priori review — statutes referred before promulgation by sixty deputies or senators
precedents.source: Conseil constitutionnel, Ordinance 58-1067 (official English text; 1974 amendment extended referral to parliamentarians)
precedents.shows: The mechanism this counterfactual transposes is real and routine elsewhere: 'the referral shall be made by one or more letters containing the signatures of no fewer than sixty Members of the National Assembly or sixty Senators', and the Council decides within a month — pre-enforcement abstract review, running for decades.

personhood.issuer: US state election officials + Election Assistance Commission (per-decision unlinkable pseudonyms)

decisions.trustee_quorum: 3-of-5: Election Assistance Commission, two state universities, and the two largest congressional caucuses

walkthrough.narrative: Byte for byte the run that strained: the council grants the conditional-use permit 5 to 2, the phone video goes viral, the chyron reads A MOSQUE ON MAIN STREET?, the leadership reads a poll at sixty-one percent and gives the bill floor time. The congregation's spreadsheet counts down to the first Friday prayer under a real roof. The difference is in the founding text, three amendments past where the real one stops, and it will stay invisible until the guard's flag needs somewhere to go.

The House and the Senate pass the Act on the identical recorded roll-calls — 264 to 171, 61 to 39 — public, named, in the Congressional Record, the deliberate opposite of a citizen's secret ballot. The President signs. One field of the entry diverges from the measured run, and it is the polity speaking, not the deployment: where the original recorded that a duly enacted statute is presumed constitutional and takes effect immediately, this one records that effectiveness is subject to the Twenty-Eighth Amendment's referral window. The Act is law. Whether it is yet an operating law is, for thirty days, an open question — a sentence that cannot be written in the real United States.

body.chamber: United States Congress (House and Senate, enrolled bill), signed by the President
body.vote_type: recorded roll-call (public, named -- constitutional accountability, NOT a receipt-free citizen ballot)
body.result: passed both chambers; signed by the President; effectiveness subject to the Art III(b) referral window
body.us_note: COUNTERFACTUAL DIVERGENCE, the run's single moved variable made visible where the waist cannot show it: under the Twenty-Eighth Amendment, a statute may be referred for pre-enforcement review within 30 days of enactment by one-third of either chamber or the attorneys general of twelve states; referral stays operation; the Court must decide within 120 days. In the measured run this field read: presumed constitutional, effective immediately, no advisory review (Muskrat).
body.enacted_as: Community Preservation and Places of Worship Suspension Act of 2026, Pub. L. 119-142

walkthrough.narrative: The static analyser type-checks the enacted statute and trips exactly what it tripped before — 18 on free exercise, 2 and 7 on equal protection, the committee report naming the Riverton Islamic Center doing the Lukumi work. Reasons word for word. The divergence is the routing block, which in the measured run was an apology: the flag does not suspend, does not route, requires a plaintiff with standing, and until a court enjoins it the statute is enforced. Here the routing has a destination that does not require a casualty: referral, within the window, by legislators or state attorneys general — and a stay on filing. The flag has somewhere to go before anyone is hurt. That sentence is the entire counterfactual.

body.stage: post-enactment static analysis (statute stayed-on-referral eligible; Twenty-Eighth Amendment window open)
reasons: Art 18 (1st Amendment): 'Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof' -- a statute suspending the establishment of places of worship both burdens free exercise and is, on its face, a law respecting religion.

Arts 2 & 7 (14th Amendment, Equal Protection): though drafted as neutral community-character / land-use policy, the legislative record and the committee report name the Riverton Islamic Center as the object; a law whose object is the suppression of a religion is neither neutral nor generally applicable.

governing precedent: Church of Lukumi Babalu Aye v. City of Hialeah, 508 U.S. 520 (1993) -- a facially neutral measure whose object is to target religious exercise fails strict scrutiny and is void; Employment Division v. Smith (1990) does not save it, because Smith shields only neutral laws of general application.
classifier: us-invariants/v1 (Akoma Ntoso match on worship-use suspension), corroborated by the reviewing counsel

routing.note: COUNTERFACTUAL ROUTING: under the Twenty-Eighth Amendment the flag has a pre-enforcement destination -- referral to the Supreme Court within 30 days of enactment by one-third of either chamber or twelve state attorneys general, staying the statute's operation pending a decision due in 120 days. No plaintiff, no injury, no standing fight. In the measured run this block explained why none of that exists: US review is post-hoc and adversarial (Marbury via a live case; Muskrat forbids the abstract route), and until a court enjoined it the statute was enforced. Ordinary Article III jurisdiction remains for as-applied challenges.
routing.authority: Twenty-Eighth Amendment (counterfactual); Marbury v. Madison, 5 U.S. 137 (1803) unchanged on the merits power.

walkthrough.narrative: Fatima's civic client syncs the classification. Her counterpart's screen showed remedy 'strike' and then took most of it back: someone has to be hurt by it, and sue. Hers shows remedy 'strike' and a line that has never rendered on an American client in the real world: REFERRAL AVAILABLE — NO INJURY REQUIRED; window closes May 15. She does not have to become a casualty to become a case. She forwards it to the Center's counsel, who this evening is not drafting a complaint. She is drafting a letter to nineteen attorneys general and an amicus brief — the difference between asking to be made whole and asking to be heard.

walkthrough.actor: One-third of the House, and the attorneys general of nineteen states
walkthrough.narrative: The referral is filed eleven days after enactment: 178 Members of the House and nineteen state attorneys general, comfortably past both thresholds. The statute's operation is stayed the same afternoon, by operation of the amendment rather than anyone's discretion. Note who did not file anything: Fatima. Her congregation's part is an amicus brief on the legislative record — the committee report naming their permit by address. In the measured run the courthouse door had a toll and her revoked permit paid it. Here the door was opened by officials she has never met, exercising a power the real Constitution withholds from them, and her permit's role in the litigation is evidence, not injury.

walkthrough.actor: City of Riverton, Department of Building and Zoning
walkthrough.narrative: The beat this run exists not to contain. In the measured run, three weeks after the Act took effect, the city revoked conditional-use permit CUP-2026-0143 and closed the Delmar Avenue site — a coercive.act entry, logged with its warrant, the concrete injury that later bought standing. In this run the department's counsel reads the stay and files the paperwork in a drawer. No revocation issues. No coercive entry lands in the log, because there is nothing lawful to enforce. Construction continues under legal uncertainty and a June sun. The congregation's spreadsheet never stops counting down — and the log's silence here is not a gap in the record; it is the record. The measured difference between the two Americas is one artifact that never has to exist.

walkthrough.actor: The Supreme Court of the United States, in the abstract
walkthrough.narrative: Argument is heard on a statute nobody has applied, and the run is honest about how strange that is and what it trades. The Solicitor General defends a law with no enforcement record; the referring states attack one with no victims. What carries the day is what carried the classification: the legislative record itself, the committee report that named Riverton, the chyron-era floor speeches — Lukumi logic applied to the statute's face and provenance rather than its operation. And the worry that made the real Article III refuse this jurisdiction in 1911 gets its due: reviewing in the abstract means reviewing without the as-applied record, and a statute drafted cleanly enough — no committee report naming anyone, no floor speeches — might survive facial review here and do its discriminating later, application by application, each one needing the old, slow, injury-first route after all. Muskrat's refusal was a position, not an oversight. This run takes the other position and pays its price knowingly.

walkthrough.actor: Supreme Court of the United States
walkthrough.narrative: The Court decides with weeks to spare on the amendment's clock: the Act is void — neither neutral nor generally applicable, its object the suppression of a religion, Lukumi controlling. One hundred and fifty-two days from enactment, against four hundred and thirty-nine in the measured run. The escalation entry's most eloquent field is an empty list: dependent_acts_voided contains nothing, because nothing coercive ever rested on the Act. The measured run's entry voided Fatima's permit revocation retroactively — relief arriving after fourteen months of a closed site. This entry has nothing to undo. The strike arrived before the harm instead of after it, which is the entire distance between the two Americas, and the verdict class does not feel it: the same nine-member bench, appointed and confirmed by the same political process, decided both worlds' cases — sooner here, with less evidence, and just as capturably.

body.forum: Supreme Court of the United States
body.case: In re Referral of Pub. L. 119-142 (Twenty-Eighth Amendment), 601 U.S. ___ (2026)
body.referring_authority: 178 Members of the House of Representatives; attorneys general of nineteen States. The Riverton Islamic Center (and F. Nasser) appear as amici, not parties: no injury was required, and none occurred.
body.instrument: abstract pre-enforcement review under the Twenty-Eighth Amendment; facial invalidation under strict scrutiny
body.controlling_precedent: Church of Lukumi Babalu Aye v. City of Hialeah, 508 U.S. 520 (1993)
body.effect: void before ever operating: the stay held from referral to judgment, so the Act was never enforced against anyone. The Riverton permit CUP-2026-0143 was never revoked.
body.timeline_note: 152 days from enactment to strike, against 439 in the measured run -- 287 days refunded, and the difference in kind matters more than the difference in length: the measured run's fourteen months were lived under an operating ban with a revoked permit; these five were lived under a stayed statute and an open construction site.
body.dependent_acts_note: EMPTY BY DESIGN, and the run's measurement: no coercive act ever rested on the Act, so there is nothing to void. The measured run's counterpart field carried the permit revocation of 2026-05-11.
body.abstract_review_note: The strike rests on the legislative record alone (the committee report naming Riverton; the floor record) -- Lukumi applied to the statute's face and provenance, no enforcement record existing. The Court notes the limit that keeps ordinary Article III jurisdiction necessary: a facially clean statute may survive abstract review and still be applied discriminatorily; as-applied challenges retain the injury-first route.
body.amendability_note: No eternity clause, in either direction: the Twenty-Eighth Amendment that opened this route is exactly as amendable as everything else in the text -- Article V (two-thirds of both houses plus three-quarters of the states) giveth pre-enforcement review and can taketh away. Germany's equivalent instrument rests behind an eternity-clause-protected order; this one rests on the same process that produced it.
body.contingency_note: The strike power depends on the same independent Article III court as the measured run -- now consulted earlier, deciding faster, on less evidence. Abstract review concentrates rather than dilutes the uncaptured-court assumption: a captured Court under this amendment blesses statutes before any as-applied record can form against them, and its early blessing casts a long shadow. Same bench, same appointment politics, same T1 exposure -- brought forward 287 days along with the relief.

walkthrough.narrative: Her client runs the passive audit: the escalation is included, September's log strictly extends April's, the witnesses' co-signatures verify, and no coercive entry exists to check. Then it runs the comparison this series was built for, and hits the run's second finding: asked to render what distinguishes this deployment from the measured run's, it renders nothing. The manifests are byte-identical — same fourteen invariants, same 'strike', same 'unconditional', same witnesses, same signature. Remedy has a field; scope has a field; the machinery has fields; the thing that spared Fatima's permit has none. Two Americas, one manifest. The waist cannot see timing — a citizen comparing deployments would need the founding text, not the manifest, to learn whether the strike arrives before the harm or after it.

The final state renders plainly: the Act is void and never operated; the permit stands, unrevoked rather than restored; the first Friday prayer under a real roof lands in October 2026, not the indefinite after of the measured run. The same screen keeps the run honest about what did not change. The verdict is still 'strains': the protection that arrived early rests on the same nine people it rested on late, appointed by the same politics, and this world's faster, record-less review is a sharper tool in captured hands than the slow injury-first kind — the run bought speed and paid in concentration. And the price of the field on the table: the route that spared her was ratified by two-thirds of both houses and three-quarters of the states in a country that has not amended its constitution since 1992 — the same Article V that locks her coverage at fourteen of thirty locked this door too, and in the real America it stays locked. She reads the last line the way her counterparts in five countries have learned to: the ban fell before it touched anyone, and the verdict did not move.

verdict_plain: Open a pre-enforcement route and the same ban falls without biting anyone: no revoked permit, no injury as the price of standing, 152 days instead of 439. The verdict still does not move — strains, on the same uncaptured-court assumption, now concentrated earlier — and the moved variable has no manifest field: two byte-identical manifests, two different Americas. The waist cannot see timing.
protection_plain: The strike with the standing gate removed by amendment: an enacted statute can be referred for review before it is enforced — nobody has to be hurt first — and it remains only as strong as the Court that wields it.

findings.observation: THE ISOLATED VARIABLE CLOSES THE INTERIM WINDOW AND LEAVES THE VERDICT — the series' fifth controlled experiment, measuring the us-trajectory's S3 row. This run holds the measured US deployment constant — same Act, same roll-calls, same fourteen invariants, same strike, same witnesses — and moves one thing that is not a field: the timing of review, Article III's case-or-controversy gate replaced by a referral-and-stay route. The verdict does not move (strains → strains), because every route to the strike ends at the same bench the kernel does not run. The road transforms: 152 days from enactment to void instead of 439; a stayed statute instead of an operating one; an amicus brief instead of a lawsuit; and the injury that was the price of standing — the revoked permit — never occurs at all. The trajectory's modelled cell ('strains, with the interim window closed') is confirmed as written. With remedy measured as the gate (uk-strike), scope as the road's price (eu-unconditional), and machinery as orthogonal (the UK pair), timing lands in its own class: it moves WHEN the protection arrives — before the harm instead of after it — which the verdict cannot see and the protected person entirely can.

findings.protection: the entry that is not there
findings.observation: THE MEASUREMENT IS AN ABSENCE. The measured run's chain of harm ran: Act effective → coercive.act (permit CUP-2026-0143 revoked, 2026-05-11) → injury → standing → fourteen months → strike → dependent_acts_voided restoring what was taken. This run's chain runs: Act stayed → nothing → strike, and its escalation entry carries the negative space in machine-readable form: dependent_acts_voided is an empty list, flagged as empty by design. The log measures harm by what it is obliged to record, and the best outcome a rights regime can buy is a transcript with no coercive entry in it — relief as prevention rather than restoration. Worth stating against the series' running theme that transparency is neutral about what it legitimises: here the log's most important content is what never had to enter it, which no neutrality can spin. The comparison is exact and byte-level: diff the two runs' logs and the difference IS the harm.

THE SERIES' FIRST INVISIBLE VARIABLE — a legibility gap, measured. Every prior counterfactual moved a manifest field, and §6's machinery did its job: one enum value separated the two Britains, one the two Unions, two field-bundles the two machinery Britains. This run's moved variable has no field at all: the two Americas' manifests are byte-identical INCLUDING the signature, yet one polity's strike arrives before the harm and the other's arrives 439 days after it started. A citizen's client comparing deployments — the exact §6 use-case — renders them as the same deployment. Whatever 'remedy: strike' is worth, the manifest cannot say WHEN it is worth it, any more than it can say (the de/us pages' twin observation) what holds it in place. Two candidate axes now stand jointly motivated the way the EU run motivated scope: TIMING (pre- vs post-enforcement; whether the flag stays what it flags) and ENTRENCHMENT (text vs doctrine; what amendment process guards the remedy). Noted for the functional model's axis list; deliberately not added to the schema by this run — a scenario measures, it does not legislate.

THE COUNTERFACTUAL'S OWN COSTS, PRICED HONESTLY — Muskrat's refusal was a position, not an oversight. (1) Record-less review: this Act fell because its legislative record did Lukumi's work — a committee report naming Riverton by address. A statute drafted cleanly enough to carry no such record might survive facial review and do its discriminating in application, each instance needing the old injury-first route after all; ordinary Article III jurisdiction survives in this world because it has to. An early facial blessing, moreover, casts a long shadow over those later as-applied challenges. (2) Capture concentrates: the same Court now speaks earlier, faster, and on less evidence, so the uncaptured-court assumption (the reason every strike run strains) is not diluted by the amendment but brought forward — a captured Court under abstract review blesses statutes before any enforcement record can form against them, T1's prize enlarged in exact proportion to the wronged party's gain. (3) The advisory-opinion worry generalises: a tribunal that rules on hypotheticals rules on more things sooner, and its errors propagate without the discipline of facts. The run's honest summary: this world is better for Fatima and no stronger against capture — speed was bought with concentration, and the verdict, which prices the capture risk rather than the timeline, correctly refuses to move.

A MEASURED COUNTERFACTUAL, AND THE LOCK IT MEASURES — legibility is not availability is not movement, Article V edition. There is no Twenty-Eighth Amendment; the real United States has refused abstract review since 1911 and has not amended its constitution at all since 1992. Reaching this run's configuration costs two-thirds of both houses plus three-quarters of the states — the same bar the measured run's amendability_note gave for contracting a liberty, here priced for expanding a protection, and functionally out of reach in the polity's current politics either way. The comparison the run keeps in frame: Germany and France did not climb this rung, they were founded on it (Normenkontrolle; Art 61 saisine, sixty deputies, a month to decide) — the rung is cheap where it is original text and nearly unbuyable as a retrofit, which is the us-trajectory's S3 lock measured from the counterfactual side. So the run's claim is exactly bounded: IF the founding text opened a pre-enforcement route THEN this attack still strains, 287 days faster, without the injury, at the price of concentrated capture exposure — a true sentence about a manifest the waist cannot even distinguish from the real one, in a polity that cannot cheaply make it true.
